tasks.title: List visible toolbar buttons
tasks.prompt: Open LibreOffice Writer. Take a screenshot. List every visible toolbar button you can identify, with a one-line label for each.

tasks.title: Type and save
tasks.prompt: Open LibreOffice Writer, type 'Hello world', then File → Save As to /workspace/agent-demo/hello.odt.

tasks.title: Bold the first paragraph
tasks.prompt: In LibreOffice Writer, select the first paragraph of the document and make it bold using the toolbar B button.

tasks.title: Reach Format → Paragraph by keyboard
tasks.prompt: In LibreOffice Writer, navigate to the Format → Paragraph menu using only Tab/Shift+Tab and arrow keys (no mouse).

tasks.title: Triple-click select a sentence
tasks.prompt: In LibreOffice Writer, triple-click anywhere in the document to select a sentence, then report the exact text that is selected.

tasks.title: Insert a 3×2 table and fill header
tasks.prompt: In LibreOffice Writer, insert a 3-row by 2-column table via Table → Insert. Fill the first row with 'Name | Score'.

tasks.title: Cross-app paste from browser
tasks.prompt: Open https://news.ycombinator.com in a browser, copy the title of the top story, switch to LibreOffice Writer, and paste it as a new line.

tasks.title: Round-trip as .docx
tasks.prompt: In Writer, save the current document as /workspace/agent-demo/test.docx, close it, reopen it, and verify the text content survived.

tasks.title: Insert a footnote
tasks.prompt: In Writer, place a footnote on the word 'Test' via Insert → Footnote. Verify a footnote marker appears at the bottom of the page.

tasks.title: Two-window paragraph copy
tasks.prompt: Open two LibreOffice Writer windows. Copy a paragraph from window A into window B. Save window B as /workspace/agent-demo/two-windows.odt.

tasks.title: Identify column headers
tasks.prompt: Open LibreOffice Calc. Take a screenshot. Report the labels of the three leftmost column headers.

tasks.title: Type into A1 and B1
tasks.prompt: In LibreOffice Calc, click cell A1, type 'Item', press Tab to move to B1, type 'Price'.

tasks.title: Navigate A1 → D5 by keyboard
tasks.prompt: In Calc, starting from A1, navigate to D5 using only Tab and Enter keys. Report the active cell at each step.

tasks.title: Sum a range
tasks.prompt: In Calc, enter 10, 20, 30, 40 in B2:B5. In B6 enter =SUM(B2:B5). Verify B6 displays 100.

tasks.title: Bold the header row
tasks.prompt: In Calc, select row 1 and apply bold via the B toolbar button.

tasks.title: Format range as currency
tasks.prompt: In Calc, select B2:B5 and format the cells as currency via Format → Cells → Currency.

tasks.title: Paste markdown table
tasks.prompt: Paste a 5-row markdown table (provided in /workspace/agent-demo/table.md) into A1:B5 of LibreOffice Calc.

tasks.title: Round-trip as .xlsx
tasks.prompt: Save the current spreadsheet as /workspace/agent-demo/demo.xlsx, close it, reopen, and confirm the SUM formula still computes.

tasks.title: Insert a chart
tasks.prompt: In Calc, select A1:B5 and insert a chart via Insert → Chart, accepting all defaults.

tasks.title: Cross-app SUM verification
tasks.prompt: Compute a SUM in Calc, copy the cell value, paste it into Writer, and verify both displays match.

tasks.title: Identify slide layout
tasks.prompt: Open LibreOffice Impress. Take a screenshot. Identify the slide layout currently showing (e.g., 'Title, Content').

tasks.title: Add a new slide
tasks.prompt: In Impress, click the '+ New Slide' button once. Verify the slide count increases to 2.

tasks.title: Add a slide title
tasks.prompt: In Impress, click the title placeholder on slide 1 and type 'Demo'.

tasks.title: Bullet body content
tasks.prompt: In Impress, click the body placeholder on slide 1 and type three bullet points: 'Point one', 'Point two', 'Point three'.

tasks.title: Change slide layout
tasks.prompt: In Impress, change the layout of slide 1 via the Layout panel to 'Title, Content, Content'.

tasks.title: Add slide in outline view
tasks.prompt: In Impress, switch to View → Outline. Use Tab/Enter to add a new slide titled 'Outline added'.

tasks.title: Save as .odp
tasks.prompt: Save the presentation as /workspace/agent-demo/demo.odp.

tasks.title: Run slideshow
tasks.prompt: Start the slideshow with F5, advance one slide with Space, then exit with Esc. Verify return to edit view.

tasks.title: Insert image into slide
tasks.prompt: In Impress, insert /workspace/agent-demo/screenshot.png into slide 2 via Insert → Image.

tasks.title: Export as PDF and verify
tasks.prompt: Export the current presentation as PDF to /workspace/agent-demo/demo.pdf. Verify the file exists and has non-zero size.

tasks.title: Identify editor panels
tasks.prompt: Open the image editor. Take a screenshot. List the dockable panels visible on launch (Toolbox, Layers, Channels, etc.).

tasks.title: Create a new canvas
tasks.prompt: In the image editor, click File → New, accept defaults, and verify a blank canvas appears.

tasks.title: Select Bucket Fill tool
tasks.prompt: In the image editor, pick the Bucket Fill tool from the toolbox by clicking its icon.

tasks.title: Add a text layer
tasks.prompt: In the image editor, add a text layer to the current image with the content 'Demo'.

tasks.title: Resize canvas
tasks.prompt: In the image editor, resize the canvas to 1024×768 via Image → Canvas Size. Verify the new dimensions in the title bar.

tasks.title: Open an existing PNG
tasks.prompt: In the image editor, open /workspace/agent-demo/screenshot.png and verify the image loads in a new window.

tasks.title: Apply Gaussian Blur
tasks.prompt: In the image editor, apply Filters → Blur → Gaussian Blur with default radius to the active layer.

tasks.title: Crop and export PNG
tasks.prompt: In the image editor, use rectangle-select to mark a region, crop to selection, and export as /workspace/agent-demo/cropped.png.

tasks.title: Flatten and save .xcf
tasks.prompt: In the image editor, flatten the image via Image → Flatten, then save as /workspace/agent-demo/flat.xcf.

tasks.title: PNG round-trip with blur
tasks.prompt: In the image editor, open a PNG, apply Gaussian Blur, export back as PNG, and verify the new file size differs from the original.

tasks.title: List home folder entries
tasks.prompt: Open the Files manager. Take a screenshot. List three folders visible in /home.

tasks.title: Navigate into a folder
tasks.prompt: In Files, double-click a folder. Verify the path bar updates to reflect the new directory.

tasks.title: Create a text file
tasks.prompt: Create a new text file at /workspace/agent-demo/note.txt with the content 'hello'.

tasks.title: Right-click Properties
tasks.prompt: In Files, right-click any file and choose Properties. Report its file size in bytes.

tasks.title: Open Hacker News in Firefox
tasks.prompt: Launch Firefox, navigate to https://news.ycombinator.com, and verify the page renders.

tasks.title: Extract top 5 stories
tasks.prompt: From the rendered Hacker News page, extract the titles and URLs of the top 5 stories.

tasks.title: Save HN list as markdown
tasks.prompt: Save the top 5 Hacker News stories as a markdown bulleted list at /workspace/agent-demo/hn.md.

tasks.title: Verify saved markdown
tasks.prompt: Read /workspace/agent-demo/hn.md back and confirm it contains exactly 5 lines beginning with '- '.

tasks.title: Open story, screenshot, close tab
tasks.prompt: In Firefox, open the first story in a new tab, take a screenshot, and close the new tab.

tasks.title: Drag markdown into Writer
tasks.prompt: Drag /workspace/agent-demo/hn.md into LibreOffice Writer, then verify the document content matches the markdown file.
